svg.title: University ERP System – UML Class Diagram
svg.desc: Full UML class diagram for the University ERP System showing Person base class, Student and Faculty subclasses, and related classes for Course, Department, Exam, Grade, and Admin.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Person base class in the University ERP system')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Student class and its role in the University ERP system')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Faculty class and its responsibilities in the University ERP system')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Course class in the University ERP system')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Department class in the University ERP system')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Exam class in the University ERP system')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Grade class in the University ERP system')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Admin class and its role in the University ERP system')
sendPrompt('How is encapsulation applied in the University ERP system?')
sendPrompt('How is inheritance applied in the University ERP system?')
sendPrompt('How is polymorphism applied in the University ERP system?')
sendPrompt('How is abstraction applied in the University ERP system?')

svg.text: ArrayList<Student> · ArrayList<Faculty> · ArrayList<Course> · ArrayList<Grade> · HashMap<String, Student>
